name: Clean company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API automatically for Follow-ups

parameters.content:
### Weekly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — weekly. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Pull Side A (HubSpot)

### Pull Side A (HubSpot)

hubspot — `search` operation against the connected account.

Next: Diff the Two Systems

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Pull Side B (Airtable)

airtable — `search` operation against the connected account.

Next: Diff the Two Systems

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Airtable PAT

### Diff the Two Systems

Diffs two streams by key into 4 lanes: only-in-A, same, different, only-in-B — the heart of the sync.

Ports: ①→ Create Missing in Airtable · ②→ Count In-Sync Rows · ③→ Apply Updates to Airtable · ④→ Backfill into HubSpot

### Create Missing in Airtable

airtable — `create` operation against the connected account.

Next: Gather Sync Results

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Airtable PAT

### Count In-Sync Rows

Collapses all items into a single summary item (for counts and run stats).

Next: Gather Sync Results

### Apply Updates to Airtable

airtable — `upsert` operation against the connected account.

Next: Gather Sync Results

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Airtable PAT

### Backfill into HubSpot

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Next: Gather Sync Results

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Gather Sync Results

Rejoins 4 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

# Clean company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API automatically for Follow-ups

**Pattern:** Data Enrichment · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Clean company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API automatically for Follow-ups. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual follow-ups is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Weekly Schedule → Pull Side A (HubSpot) → Diff the Two Systems → Create Missing in Airtable → Gather Sync Results

## Use it for
- Teams that want to data enrichment without manual effort
- Anyone automating follow-ups in sales
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Standardizes the process every time
- Responds in seconds
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Airtable PAT; HubSpot private-app token.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🧹 Data quality

Dedupe/diff steps make re-runs safe: the same input twice will not create duplicate records. If you change the key fields, clear n8n's dedupe memory (node → 'Clear stored keys') before the next run.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your follow-ups process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
